summary: Frontend testing completed for the AdminFoods search/filter functionality in the Banque d'aliments page. All 10 features requested for testing are working correctly.
seed_data_creation: TEST_Aliment was created and deleted during CRUD testing - database returned to original 24 foods state
context_for_next_testing_agent: All search/filter features in AdminFoods component are working. Access via: Home > Accès Admin > Aliments. Database has 24 foods: 9 Protéines, 9 Glucides, 6 Lipides.

1_search_by_name.details: Search 'poulet' returned 1 result, 'riz' returned 1 result, with (sur 24) count displayed

2_filter_category_badge.details: Clicking Protéines badge filtered to 9 results, clicking again deselected the filter

3_filter_category_dropdown.details: Selecting 'Glucides' from dropdown filtered to 9 results

5_sort_functionality.details: Sorting by calories showed 'Huile d'olive' (884 kcal) first

6_clear_filters_button.details: Button appears when filters are active, clicking resets all filters back to 24 results

7_food_counter_update.details: Counter displays 'X aliments (sur Y)' format when filtered, updates correctly

8_add_new_food.details: Modal opens, form submits successfully, food count increased from 24 to 25

9_edit_existing_food.details: Edit modal opens with 'Modifier l'aliment' title, changes save correctly

10_delete_food.details: Confirmation dialog shows, food deleted, count returned to 24

additional_observations.no_results_state: Properly displays 'Aucun aliment trouvé' message with 'Effacer les filtres' button
additional_observations.category_stats_badges: Display correct counts (Protéines: 9, Glucides: 9, Lipides: 6) and toggle on click
additional_observations.food_cards: Display all macros (kcal, prot, gluc, lip) and meal badges correctly
additional_observations.ui_quality: Clean, responsive design with proper styling and transitions
